giftCard.sendAsGift: Send as a gift to someone else
giftCard.sendAsGiftHelp: The code is emailed directly to the recipient with your personal message.
giftCard.scheduleInvalid: Pick a date and time in the future.
giftCard.howItWorksStep1Desc: Pick a fixed amount or set your own, anywhere between €{min} and €{max}.
giftCard.howItWorksStep2Desc: Send it straight to the recipient with your own message, or schedule delivery for a specific date.
giftCard.howItWorksStep3Desc: Once paid, the unique code lands by email, ready to spend on anything in the collection.
giftCard.faq1Q: What can I spend it on?
giftCard.faq1A: Anything on mosewear.com: basics, hoodies, tees and sweaters. Sale items included.
giftCard.faq2Q: How long is the card valid?
giftCard.faq2A: {months} months after purchase. Any unspent balance stays on the card until that date.
giftCard.faq2AFallback: Any unspent balance stays on the card until you've used it up.
giftCard.faq3Q: Can I split it across orders?
giftCard.faq3A: Yes, the balance can be spent across multiple orders until it's used up.
giftCard.faq4Q: Does it stack with discount codes?
giftCard.faq4A: The card always works on sale prices. Stacking with promo codes depends on the campaign. You'll see it during checkout.

items.question: How does the fit run?
items.answer: True to size, pick your usual size. Between two sizes? Go up for a slightly more relaxed silhouette. The size chart is right next to the size selector.

items.question: When will I receive my order?
items.answer: Order before 5 PM and we ship the same day with DHL. At your door tomorrow in NL and BE, 1 to 3 business days afterwards. No minimum order, shipping is always free.

items.question: What if the size doesn't fit?
items.answer: No worries. Return or exchange within 30 days. Sign in to your account, register the return and we'll email you a return label.

items.question: Is this really made in Groningen?
items.answer: Yes, 100%. We work with a single local atelier in Groningen where every piece is finished by hand. No sweatshops, no long supply chains.

items.question: Can I pay in installments?
items.answer: Yes. With Klarna you can split your purchase into 3 payments at zero interest, or pay later within 14 days. Both options appear at checkout.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED
faq.description: Everything you need to know about MOSE, shipping and returns

items.question: How do MOSE garments fit?
items.answer: Our clothing fits true to size. We recommend ordering your usual size. Unsure between two sizes? Choose the larger size for a relaxed fit. All sizes are designed for optimal comfort.

items.question: What are the shipping costs and delivery time?
items.answer: Shipping within the Netherlands and Belgium is always free, regardless of order amount. Orders are processed and shipped within 1-2 business days. Delivery then takes 1-3 business days via DHL.

items.question: Can I return my order?
items.answer: Yes! You have {returnDays} days to return from receipt. Items must be unworn with tags still attached. You can easily request a return via your customer portal. Return costs are €{returnCost} and will be deducted from your refund. You'll receive your refund within 5 business days.

items.question: How do I care for my MOSE clothing?
items.answer: Wash at 30°C inside out, do not use bleach and preferably do not tumble dry. Iron at low temperature if necessary. This way your MOSE garment will stay beautiful for years.

items.question: Is MOSE really locally produced?
items.answer: Absolutely! All our clothing is 100% produced in the Netherlands, mainly in Groningen. We work together with a local atelier that shares our quality standards. No long transport chains, just fair production.

items.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept iDEAL, Mastercard, Visa, American Express, PayPal and Bancontact. All payments are securely processed via Stripe. Your payment details are always protected.

intro.title: 1. INTRODUCTION
intro.content: MOSE (mosewear.com) respects the privacy of all visitors to the website and ensures that the personal information you provide is treated confidentially. This privacy policy explains what data we collect and what we use it for.

dataCollection.title: 2. WHAT DATA DO WE COLLECT?
dataCollection.intro: We collect the following personal data:
items: Name and address (for shipping orders)
Email address (for order confirmations and communication)
Phone number (for delivery and customer service)
Payment details (securely processed via Stripe, not stored by us)
Order history and preferences

dataUsage.title: 3. WHAT DO WE USE YOUR DATA FOR?
items: Processing and shipping your orders
Communication about your order (confirmation, shipping, tracking)
Customer service and support
Improving our website and services
Marketing (only with your consent)

dataRetention.title: 4. HOW LONG DO WE KEEP YOUR DATA?
dataRetention.content: We do not retain your personal data longer than necessary for the purposes for which it was collected. We keep order data for 7 years in accordance with tax legislation. You can always request deletion of your data via

thirdParties.title: 5. SHARING WITH THIRD PARTIES
thirdParties.intro: We only share your data with:
items: Shipping partners (for delivery of your order)
Stripe (for secure payment processing)
Hosting providers (for data storage)
thirdParties.outro: We never sell your data to third parties and only share it when necessary for fulfilling your order.

security.title: 6. SECURITY
security.content: We take the protection of your data seriously and have implemented appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against loss or unlawful processing. We use SSL encryption for all data transfer and secure servers for storage.

cookies.title: 7. COOKIES
cookies.content: We use functional cookies that are necessary for the proper functioning of the website (such as your shopping cart). We ask for your consent for analytical cookies. You can always refuse cookies through your browser settings.

rights.title: 8. YOUR RIGHTS
items: Request access to your personal data
Have your data corrected or deleted
Object to processing
Transfer your data (data portability)
rights.outro: Contact us via {email} to exercise these rights.

changes.title: 9. CHANGES
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. You can always find the most recent version on this page. We will communicate important changes via email.

contact.title: 10. CONTACT
contact.intro: Do you have questions about this privacy policy? Contact us:

general.title: 1. GENERAL
general.content: These terms and conditions apply to all offers and agreements of MOSE (mosewear.com), located in Groningen, Netherlands. By placing an order, you agree to these terms.

pricing.title: 2. OFFERS AND PRICES
items: All prices are in euros and include VAT
Shipping costs are listed separately at checkout
Free shipping from €{threshold} within the Netherlands and Belgium
Prices and stock may change without prior notice

ordering.title: 3. ORDERING
ordering.content: Your order is only final after we have sent an order confirmation by email. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders, for example in case of incorrect prices or suspected abuse.

payment.title: 4. PAYMENT
items: Payment is processed securely via Stripe
We accept iDEAL, credit card and Bancontact
Your payment must be completed before we ship your order
Failed payments will automatically cancel your order

shipping.title: 5. SHIPPING
items: Orders within the Netherlands are shipped via DHL
Delivery time is 2-5 business days within the Netherlands and Belgium
You will receive a track & trace code upon shipment
Shipping costs: €4.95 (free from €{threshold})

returns.title: 6. RETURNS
items: You have {days} days cooling-off period from receipt
Products must be unworn and in original condition
Returns are free within the Netherlands and Belgium
Return shipments are processed within 5 business days

warranty.title: 7. WARRANTY
warranty.content: All products come with a 2-year manufacturer warranty against material and manufacturing defects. This warranty does not cover normal wear and tear or damage from improper use.

liability.title: 8. LIABILITY
liability.content: MOSE is not liable for indirect damage or consequential damage arising from the use of our products, unless there is intent or gross negligence.

disputes.title: 9. DISPUTES
disputes.content: Dutch law applies to all agreements. Disputes will be submitted to the competent court in Groningen.

contact.title: 10. QUESTIONS
contact.content: Do you have questions about these terms? Contact us via {email} or call {phone}.

story.title: OUR STORY
story.paragraph1:
We're Irma and Rick, the founders of MOSE.

We live with our cats Bob and Marley and our doggo Guus in Groningen, in Helpman. As of September we're even married. Wow, serious stuff.

"Why MOSE?" Our late cat was named Mosie, we called her Moos. This is our tribute to her. 🐱
story.paragraph2:
We started MOSE because fast fashion irritates us. We kept buying expensive t-shirts that were ready for the bin after a few washes. So we make clothing that lasts. Sustainable, honest and local. Even after countless washes.

Local? Yes. Just made in the atelier in Groningen.

local.title: LOCALLY MADE IN GRONINGEN
local.text: All our products are locally made in Groningen. Not because it's trendy, but because we want to know exactly where our clothing comes from and how it's made. Honest, transparent, and with respect for everyone involved in the process.

quality.title: Premium quality
quality.text: Only the finest materials and perfect finishing. Clothing that lasts for years.

localMade.title: Locally made
localMade.text: 100% produced in Groningen. We know everyone who works on your clothing.

fairPricing.title: Fair pricing
fairPricing.text: No inflated prices or fake sales. Just honest pricing for what you get.

noHassle.title: No hassle
noHassle.text: {days} days return policy, free shipping from €{threshold}, and fast customer service. Simple.

sustainable.title: Sustainable without the BS
sustainable.text: We make clothing that lasts. That's the best sustainability.

stylish.title: Rugged yet stylish
stylish.text: Basics with character. For modern men who know what they want.

local.title: Proudly local
local.text: Made in Groningen, worn throughout the Netherlands.

insiderCommunity.title: YOU'RE NOT ALONE
insiderCommunity.subtitle: A behind-the-scenes look at our community
insiderCommunity.intro: Hundreds of insiders are waiting for the launch. Not random shoppers. People who get what MOSE stands for.
insiderCommunity.stat2: Most popular: Hoodies (already 40% of stock reserved)
insiderCommunity.testimonial1: "Finally a Dutch brand that doesn't sell bullshit. Just clean, solid basics."
insiderCommunity.testimonial2: "Those hoodies look insane. Can't wait for March 2."
insiderCommunity.testimonial3: "Love that they produce locally. That makes the difference."

insiderCommunity.closing: We're building this together. See you at launch.

insiderBehindScenes.title: HOW WE MAKE THIS
insiderBehindScenes.subtitle: A look into the process
insiderBehindScenes.intro: You asked for it. Here is what happens behind the scenes at MOSE: from idea to product.
insiderBehindScenes.process1: Locally designed in Groningen. Everything starts here.
insiderBehindScenes.process2: Made with premium materials. No cheap stuff.
insiderBehindScenes.process3: Limited runs. When it's gone, it's gone.
insiderBehindScenes.limitedText: We don't do mass production. Every drop is limited. That means unique, exclusive and not for everyone. Early access ensures you don't miss out.
insiderBehindScenes.closing: This is what you support when you buy from MOSE. No corporate bullshit. Just honest design, locally made.
insiderBehindScenes.ps: P.S. Launch is in {days} days. You have early access. Use it.

insiderLaunchWeek.title: LAUNCH IN {days} DAYS
insiderLaunchWeek.subtitle: This is it. {days} days until launch.
insiderLaunchWeek.intro: March 2nd. That's {days} days away. For you as an insider, that means 24-hour early access before everyone else can shop.
insiderLaunchWeek.info1: You can shop from March 1st at 00:00
insiderLaunchWeek.info3: Limited items disappear fast. Early access matters.
insiderLaunchWeek.perk3: Free shipping on your first order
insiderLaunchWeek.statusNotYet: ✓ If you haven't shopped yet: wait until March 1st at 00:00 for early access
insiderLaunchWeek.closing: This is the moment. {days} days. Are you ready?
insiderLaunchWeek.ps: P.S. Last reminder: March 1st at 00:00 doors open for insiders. Set your alarm.

newsletterPopup.dismissLink: No thanks, I'll pay full price

cookieConsent.title: Cookies & Privacy
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and optimize our marketing. You can choose which cookies to accept.

help.intro: Team MOSE is happy to help you with:

surveyPopup.introTitle: Can we have 1 minute of your time?
surveyPopup.introText: We are MOSE, a new clothing brand from Groningen. We want to create the best webshop. Your feedback is crucial.
surveyPopup.question1: How likely are you to buy something in our webshop?
surveyPopup.question2: What do you need to purchase something in our webshop?
surveyPopup.question3: What is your first impression of MOSE?
surveyPopup.question4Description: Subscribe to our newsletter and get early access to new drops and exclusive offers.
surveyPopup.thankYouMessage: We use your feedback to improve the webshop.
